head_html:
<style>
.blog-page{background:#f5f4ee;color:#17352d;font-family:Arial,sans-serif}.blog-wrap{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px}.blog-page a{color:#1d4d3d;text-decoration:none}.blog-page a:hover{text-decoration:underline}.blog-nav{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:20px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #d7d3c8}.blog-brand{font:700 20px Georgia,serif;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}.blog-links{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px}.blog-button,.blog-chip,.blog-page-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #1d4d3d;background:#fff;color:#1d4d3d;font-weight:600}.blog-button,.blog-chip.active,.blog-page-link.active{background:#1d4d3d;color:#fff}.blog-hero{padding:48px 0 20px}.blog-hero h1,.blog-article h1{margin:0 0 14px;font:700 clamp(2.3rem,5vw,4.4rem)/1.05 Georgia,serif;color:#17352d}.blog-copy{max-width:760px;line-height:1.7;color:#446259}.blog-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:20px}.blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:22px;padding:24px 0 54px}.blog-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd8cc;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden}.blog-card img{width:100%;height:220px;object-fit:cover;display:block;background:#d8ddd8}.blog-card__body{padding:20px}.blog-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#537a68}.blog-card h2{margin:12px 0 10px;font:700 28px/1.15 Georgia,serif}.blog-card p,.blog-empty,.blog-footer{line-height:1.7;color:#446259}.blog-pagination{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;padding-bottom:64px}.blog-article{padding:20px 0 64px}.blog-article-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 300px;gap:36px}.blog-content,.blog-aside{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd8cc;border-radius:24px}.blog-content{padding:28px}.blog-content img{max-width:100%;height:auto}.blog-richtext{line-height:1.85;color:#203d35}.blog-richtext h2,.blog-richtext h3,.blog-richtext h4{font-family:Georgia,serif;color:#17352d}.blog-aside{padding:24px}.blog-aside h3{margin-top:0;font:700 22px/1.2 Georgia,serif}.blog-aside ul{margin:0;padding-left:18px}.blog-adjacent{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:14px;margin-top:28px}.blog-adjacent a{display:block;padding:16px;border:1px solid #ddd8cc;border-radius:18px;background:#fbfaf7}.blog-footer{margin-top:10px;padding:28px 0 48px;border-top:1px solid #d7d3c8;font-size:14px}.blog-footer__links{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;margin-top:12px}.blog-note{margin:0 0 14px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#537a68}@media (max-width:960px){.blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.blog-article-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}@media (max-width:700px){.blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.blog-wrap{padding:0 18px}}</style>
<link rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml" title="Pikt Blog RSS" href="{{ rss_url }}">
{% if structured_data_json %}<script type="application/ld+json">{{ structured_data_json | safe }}</script>{% endif %}
{% if noindex_meta %}<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">{% endif %}
meta_description: Commercial cleaning insights, facility care guidance, and recurring service ideas for teams that run real buildings.
name: page-blog-index
